name: accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month tool
description: For accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, manual data entry causes compliance issues. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and formatting.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating formatted payroll reports for audits
